name: Maid Q [OC]
description:
📖"Eh? What if..."👓

Murder drones OC

Riiigght! What do we have here? Little maid, huh? JCTech worker drone Q! She's here to spread cuteness and warm smile to you!

She's so tiny! And so pure! Awww.... I looove herr... Whoops! Hehe, got carried away there! Righty'O let get back to the point.

She's here with the murder drones. Lives in the landing pod, clean and adjust.. I wonder how she'll reach the high shelf...

Anyway. I'll give this model 100 out of 10! Purr point from her cuteness and shyness! Aw...

— By

Britney Elise Lawson.

— Classification

JCJenson Head Technician.
